mapper.select: SELECT l.loanNo, l.bookNumber, l.memberNo, l.loanDate, l.dueDate, l.returnDate, l.extension, l.requeststate, b.bookTitle, b.Writer FROM loan l JOIN book b ON l.bookNumber = b.bookNumber WHERE l.memberNo = #{memberNo} AND l.requeststate = 2 ORDER BY l.loanNo DESC

SELECT l.loanNo, l.bookNumber, l.memberNo, l.loanDate, l.dueDate, l.returnDate, l.extension, l.requeststate, m.memberId, b.bookTitle, b.Writer AS writer FROM loan l JOIN book b ON l.bookNumber = b.bookNumber JOIN member m ON l.memberNo = m.memberNo WHERE m.memberId = #{memberId} AND l.requeststate IN (1, 2, 3) ORDER BY l.loanNo DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO loan (bookNumber, memberNo, requeststate) VALUES (#{bookNumber}, #{memberNo}, #{requestState})
mapper.select: SELECT b.Category FROM loan l JOIN book b ON l.bookNumber = b.bookNumber WHERE l.memberNo = #{memberNo} GROUP BY b.Category ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE loan SET requeststate = 3 WHERE loanNo = #{loanNo} AND extension = true
UPDATE loan SET requeststate = 2, loanDate = CURDATE(), dueDate = DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) WHERE loanNo = #{loanNo} AND requeststate = 1
UPDATE loan SET requeststate = 2, dueDate = DATE_ADD(dueDate, INTERVAL 7 DAY), extension = false WHERE loanNo = #{loanNo} AND extension = true
UPDATE loan SET requeststate = 4, returnDate = CURDATE() WHERE loanNo = #{loanNo}
